LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_AreaRadiusPositive: Area radius must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ChainBounceCount: Chain bounce count must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ChainBounceFalloff: Chain bounce damage falloff cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ChainBounceRange: Chain bounce search range must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ComboStackBonusPerSt: Combo stack bonus damage per stack cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ComboStackMax: Combo stack max must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ComboStackWindowTick: Combo stack window must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_DashEmpowerBonusScal: Dash empower bonus scale cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_DashEmpowerDurationT: Dash empower duration must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ExecuteBonusScale: Execute bonus scale cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ExecuteThreshold: Execute threshold must be between 0 and 1.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_FollowupCooldownTick: Follow-up cooldown lock duration must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_HitCooldownRefundPer: Hit cooldown refund percent must be between 0 and 1.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_HitHealRequired: Hit heal must define at least a flat heal amount or a heal ratio.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_HitHealValues: Hit heal flat amount and ratio cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_HotkeyOverrideAbilit: Hotkey override must specify an ability DefName.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_HotkeyOverrideDurati: Hotkey override duration must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_IrregularPatternRequ: Irregular area mode requires pattern data.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_KillRefreshCooldownP: Kill refresh cooldown percent must be between 0 and 1.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_MarkDetonationDamage: Mark detonation damage must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_MarkDurationTicks: Mark duration must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_MarkMaxStacks: Mark max stacks must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_MissingHealthMaxScal: Missing health max scale cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_MissingHealthPerTen: Missing health bonus per 10% cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_PeriodicPulseInterva: Periodic pulse interval must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_PeriodicPulseTotalTi: Periodic pulse total duration must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_PierceBonusPerTarget: Pierce bonus damage per target cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_PierceMaxTargets: Pierce max targets must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_PierceSearchRange: Pierce search range must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ShieldDurationTicks: Shield duration must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ShieldMaxDamage: Shield max damage must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ShieldRatios: Shield heal ratio and bonus damage ratio cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_AttachedShieldVisual: Attached shield visual scale must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ProjectileIntercepto: Projectile interceptor shield requires a ThingDef name.
Projectile interceptor shield duration must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_AutoExpireFlightMarker: Auto Expire Flight Marker On Landing
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_SlowFieldDurationTic: Slow field duration must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_SlowFieldHediffDefNa: Slow field must specify a HediffDefName.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_SlowFieldRadius: Slow field radius must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_SmartJumpOffsetCells: Smart jump offset cells cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_SplitDamageScale: Split projectile damage scale cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_SplitProjectileCount: Split projectile count must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_SplitSearchRange: Split projectile search range must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_ImportNoAbilities: No importable abilities were found in this XML
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_ImportReplaced: Imported {0} abilities from {1} and replaced the current list
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_ImportXmlHint: Enter the path to an existing XML file. Supports direct ModularAbilityDef XML, PawnSkinDef embedded abilities, or standard AbilityDef XML, and converts them into the editor's editable ability format.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_IrregularPatternHint: Use custom cell offsets to define an irregular area.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_NoResults: No abilities match the current filter
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_PreviewEmptyHint: Select an ability to preview its cast flow, payload, runtime behavior, and visual effects.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_PreviewHintLine: This preview is for editor visualization only.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_PreviewRuntimeHitSlowF: Slow field on hit: {0}t, radius {1}, Hediff {2}
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_PreviewRuntimeMissingH: Missing health bonus: +{0} per 10% missing, cap {1}
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_PreviewRuntimeNearbyEn: Nearby enemy bonus: up to {0}, +{1} each, radius {2}
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_PreviewRuntimePierceBo: Pierce bonus: up to {0}, +{1} each, radius {2}
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_PreviewRuntimeSmartJum: Smart jump: offset {0} cells, distance {1}, cooldown {2}t
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_SelectHint: Select an ability, or create a new one.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Ability_SelectOrCreate: Please select or create an ability
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Effect_EmptyHint: No effects yet. Click the button above to add one.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_ChainBounce: Bounces to nearby targets after a hit.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_ComboStacks: Builds bonus damage stacks on repeated hits within a short window.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_DashEmpoweredStri: Empowers the next strike for a short time after dashing.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_ExecuteBonusDamag: Deals bonus damage to low-health targets.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_FollowupCooldownG: Applies a temporary follow-up lock on a specific hotkey slot.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_FullHealthBonusDa: Deals bonus damage to full-health targets.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_HitCooldownRefund: Refunds part of the cooldown on hit.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_HitSlowField: Creates a slow field on hit.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_HotkeyOverride: Temporarily remaps a hotkey slot to another ability.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_IsolatedTargetBon: Deals bonus damage to isolated targets.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_KillRefresh: Refunds part of the cooldown on kill.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_MarkDetonation: Applies marks and detonates them when the condition is met.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_MissingHealthBonu: The lower the target health, the higher the damage.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_NearbyEnemyBonusD: Deals more bonus damage when more enemies are nearby.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_PeriodicPulse: Triggers pulse effects periodically over a duration.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_PierceBonusDamage: Increases damage after each pierced target.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_ProjectileSplit: Splits a projectile into multiple child projectiles.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_QComboWindow: Provides a short combo window for linked abilities.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_RStackDetonation: Detonates multiple shockwaves after reaching the required stacks.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_ShieldAbsorb: Creates a shield that absorbs damage and converts it into benefits.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_Desc_SmartJump: Uses mouse or offset rules to choose a smart jump landing point.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_FlightSuppressCombat: Suppress normal combat actions during flight
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Runtime_SmartJumpFallback: Use Offset Landing If No Valid Target
LanguageData.CS_Studio_VFX_EmptyHint: No visual effects. Click "+ Add" to configure particle/glow effects played on ability cast.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_VFX_FacingModeHint: Facing changes the basis used by forward/side offsets and also adds base auto-rotation for custom texture VFX.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ControlMoveDistance: Control move distance must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_DamageAmount: Damage amount must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_EShortJumpDistance: Jump distance must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_EShortJumpFindCellRa: Landing search radius cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_EffectChanceRange: Effect chance {0} must be between 0 and 1.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_FlightDurationTicks: Flight duration must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_FlightHeightFactor: Flight height factor cannot be negative.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_FlightHeightFactorWa: Flight height factor is unusually high.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_FlightOnlyFollowupRe: Reserved target cell is recommended for this follow-up mode.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_FlightOnlyFollowupSo: Source ability DefName is recommended for this flight-only follow-up.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_FullHealthBonusScale: Full-health bonus scale must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_FullHealthThreshold: Full-health threshold must be between 0 and 1.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_IsolatedTargetBonusS: Isolated target bonus scale must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_IsolatedTargetRadius: Isolation radius must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_LandingBurstDamage: Landing burst damage must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_LandingBurstRadius: Landing burst radius must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_NearbyEnemyBonusMaxT: Nearby-enemy max targets must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_NearbyEnemyBonusPerT: Nearby-enemy bonus per target must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_NearbyEnemyBonusRadi: Nearby-enemy radius must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_ProjectileDefMissing: Projectile carrier is missing a projectile def.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_QComboWindowTicks: Combo window must be greater than 0 ticks.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_RRequiredStacks: Required stacks must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_RWaveDamage: Wave damage values must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_RWaveRadius: Wave radius values must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_RuntimeConflict_HitE: {0} has no effect with Self carrier type.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_SummonCount: Summon count must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_TerraformSpawnCount: Terraform spawn count must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_TerraformTerrainRequ: Terraform terrain replacement requires a TerrainDef.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Export_ConfirmRights: I confirm I have the right to export these assets.
LanguageData.CS_Studio_Export_ConfirmRights_Desc: You must confirm asset rights before export.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_DashDistance: Dash distance must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_DashStepDuration: Dash ticks per cell must be greater than 0.
LanguageData.CS_Ability_Validate_DashEquipAnimKey: Weapon animation linkage enabled but trigger key is empty.
